title: Your support means everything to us.
subtitle: Mrija is driven by volunteering and generous contributions. Every krone goes directly to our local education programs.
feature1Desc: Every krone is tracked and reported monthly.
feature2Desc: Funds go directly to our local programs.
feature3Desc: A growing community of global supporters.
cancellationTerms: There is no binding period, and if you wish to stop your regular deduction agreement, please contact us at phone +47 912 54 807 or email mrija.i.drammen@gmail.com
